zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Knightley III於1220年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德時，他的父親Robert de Knightley II35歲，母親Agnes d'Oyly31歲。他於1240年之前與Aline de Pantulf在英國斯塔福爾麗莉結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1301年在他的家鄉享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Knightley III于1220年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯塔福德时，他的父亲Robert de Knightley II35岁，母亲Agnes d'Oyly31岁。他于1240年之前与Aline de Pantulf在英国斯塔福爾麗莉结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1301年在他的家乡享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Knightley III was born in 1220, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Knightley II, was 35 and his mother, Agnes d'Oyly, was 31. He married Aline de Pantulf before 1240, in Knightley, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1301, in his hometown, at the age of 81, and was buried in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Knightley III est né en 1220, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Knightley II, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnes d'Oyly, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Aline de Pantulf avant 1240, à Knightley, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1301, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Knightley III 1220 in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Knightley II 35 und seine Mutter Agnes d'Oyly 31. Er hat vor 1240 in Knightley, Staffordshire, England Aline de Pantulf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1301 im Alter von 81 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Knightley III è nato il nel 1220 nel Stafford, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Knightley II, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Agnes d'Oyly, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Aline de Pantulf prima del 1240, nel Knightley, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1301, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Knightley IIIが1220年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで生まれた時，父Robert de Knightley IIは35歳，母Agnes d'Oylyは31歳であった。1240年以前にイギリススタフォードシュアイアナイトリーでAline de Pantulfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1301年に故郷で81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Knightley III(이)가 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Knightley II(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes d'Oyly(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1240년 이전 영국 스태퍼드실르 나이틀리에서 Aline de Pantulf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1301년 그의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Knightley III nasceu em 1220, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Knightley II, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Agnes d'Oyly, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Aline de Pantulf antes 1240, em Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1301, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Knightley III родился в 1220 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Knightley II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes d'Oyly, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Aline de Pantulf перед 1240 г. в местности нагтли, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1301 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Knightley III nació en 1220, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Knightley II, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Agnes d'Oyly, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Aline de Pantulf antes de 1240, en Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1301, en su pueblo, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
